implBasis: 自建(native <input type=file> hidden + drag events + dragDepth 深度計數):variant dropzone(role=button + 4 狀態 data-state)/ button(Button tertiary);預設 children = <Empty icon={Upload}>(SSOT 復用);files 清單經 <FileItem> 渲染(gap 依 fileListMode)
claimsVerified: 4 狀態視覺表逐格對 code:idle border-border bg-surface / hover=drag-over 統一 border-primary-hover(data-[state=idle]:hover + data-[state=drag-over],:306-312)/ loading cursor-progress + CircularProgress 48 + aria-busy / disabled bg-disabled + 邊框不變色 + Empty disabled + cursor-not-allowed
state 優先序 disabled > loading > drag-over > idle = code :171;isBlocked guard(click/key/drag)取代 pointer-events-none = spec/註解一致
深度計數 dragDepth(+1/−1,drop 歸零;不依賴 relatedTarget — Safari 恆 null)= code :134-138,268-295 = spec 邊界案例 2026-07-06 宣稱一致
blocked 時 dragover/drop 仍 preventDefault(擋瀏覽器整頁開檔導航)= code :284-292 = spec「操作被吞掉」宣稱 ✓
同檔重選:onChange 後 e.target.value=''(兩 variant 都有,:236-237,:333-334)= spec 邊界案例 ✓
multiple=false 多檔只取第一個(accepted.slice(0,1))/ onReject size/type 各觸發一次 / accept 支援 .ext・type/*・完整 MIME(matchAccept)= spec Props 行為逐條 ✓
a11y:role=button + tabIndex(blocked -1)+ Enter/Space 觸發 + aria-disabled + input className=hidden(移出 a11y 樹)= spec A11y 段 ✓
loading deferred 宣稱三方一致(spec 表 / anatomy 註解+Inspector 標註 / tsx docblock):showcase 無 loading story、prop 保留
files 清單:<ul aria-label> + FileItem(status→bar/✓/✗)+ onRemove X(Button xs text,不套 dismiss prop — 對齊 inline-action「onRemove 不觸發 dismiss」)+ removeAriaLabel 模板 = spec ✓
variant=button:Button variant=tertiary startIcon=Upload + loading/disabled + click-only(無 drag handlers)= spec 兩種觸發外觀表 ✓
children 覆寫 → 不渲染 Empty(children ?? <Empty>)✓;description 預設依 multiple 分流 ✓
gap 消費 FileItem List wrapper canonical(rich gap-2 mt-2 / compact gap-1 mt-1)= code :183
